rationale: Single targeted bug fix: exclude user_context from MCPExecutionContext.to_request_fields() so it is not sent in the tools/list request body, which the MCP-Connect server rejects as an extra forbidden field. Affects 1-3 source files and 1 test file.

actual.rationale: Delivered as estimated: +1 line to exclusion set in models.py, +5 lines docstring, field description update. Test-only updates in 2 test files (1 new test, 1 rewritten, 5 assertion sites updated). No cross-service changes, no schema/API changes, no security changes. Actual complexity slightly below initial estimate (6 vs 8) — purely surgical fix.
